name: Farmae S.p.A.
summary: Farma√É¬® S.p.A. operates as an e-retailer of health and well-being products for people and pets in Italy. It offers a range of approximately 37,000 products in 10 categories, including cosmetics and make-up; over-the-counter drugs, and orthopedic products and aids; homoeopathic products; parafarmaci; medical devices; children's products; herbal medicine; dietary products; and products for pets through its website, as well as 8 Farma√É¬® stores in Tuscany and a beauty store in Viareggio. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Viareggio, Italy.
